zh.lifeSummary: 當John Aston於1444年4月4日出生在英國素瑞紐迪蓋特時，他的父親Sir Robert Aston29歲，母親Isabell de Brereton32歲。他於1467年與Elizabeth Delves在英國素瑞阿申亞德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1484年8月4日在英國斯塔福爾享年40歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Aston于1444年4月4日出生在英国素瑞紐迪蓋特时，他的父亲Sir Robert Aston29岁，母亲Isabell de Brereton32岁。他于1467年与Elizabeth Delves在英国素瑞阿申亞德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1484年8月4日在英国斯塔福爾享年40岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Aston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Ad(e)stan, which is usually from Old English Æthelstān (see Alston ). It may also be from the much rarer Old English name Ēadstān.
habitational name from any of several places in England called Aston. Most were named with Old English ēast ‘east’ + tūn ‘settlement’. In a few cases the first element is æsc ‘ash tree’.

variants.name: Alston
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Alstan, which is a coalescence of several different Old English personal names: Æthelstān ‘noble stone’, Ælfstān ‘elf stone’, Ealdstān ‘old stone’, or Ealhstān ‘temple stone’.

habitational name from any of various places called Alston (in Cumbria, Lancashire, Devon, and Somerset) or Alstone (in Gloucestershire and Staffordshire). With the exception of Alston in Cumbria, which is formed with the Old Norse personal name Halfdan, these placenames all consist of an Old English personal name + Old English tūn ‘settlement’, for example Ælfsige in the case of Alstone in Gloucestershire.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Aston was born on 4 April 1444, in Newdigate, Surrey, England, his father, Sir Robert Aston, was 29 and his mother, Isabell de Brereton, was 32. He married Elizabeth Delves in 1467, in Ashtead, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 4 August 1484, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Aston est né le 4 avril 1444, à Newdigate, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Aston, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Isabell de Brereton, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Delves en 1467, à Ashtead, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 4 août 1484, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Aston am 4. April 1444 in Newdigate, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Aston 29 und seine Mutter Isabell de Brereton 32. Er hat 1467 in Ashtead, Surrey, England Elizabeth Delves geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 4. August 1484 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Staffordshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Aston è nato il il 4 aprile 1444 nel Newdigate, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Aston, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Isabell de Brereton, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Delves nel 1467, nel Ashtead, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 4 agosto 1484, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Astonが1444年4月4日にイギリススリーニューディガトで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Astonは29歳，母Isabell de Breretonは32歳であった。1467年にイギリススリーアシュテアドでElizabeth Delvesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1484年8月4日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで40歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Aston(이)가 1444년 4월 4일 영국 수리 뉴디가트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Aston(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell de Brereton(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1467년 영국 수리 애슈테아드에서 Elizabeth Delves(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1484년 8월 4일 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Aston nasceu em 4 de abril de 1444, em Newdigate, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Aston, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Isabell de Brereton, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Delves em 1467, em Ashtead, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1484, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Aston родился 4 апреля 1444 г. в местности нюдигэит, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Aston было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell de Brereton, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Delves в 1467 г. в местности аштид, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 4 августа 1484 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth Delves en 1467, en Ashtead, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1484, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
